topic: Distill the Roblox AI game development process into a proper RobloxAIDev architecture with agent prompts, design docs, tradeoff analysis, alternatives, and runnable POC validation.
rubric: Must produce repo-native docs that define the end-to-end AI Roblox game-dev process; must define agent prompt lanes and responsibilities; must compare alternatives with pros/cons; must run POCs or tests that validate headless generation, asset-brain merging, and batch visual-gate contracts; must record evidence and keep Studio as a gated validator rather than a default construction surface; must avoid binaries/screenshots/auth state in the asset brain.
